message:
feat(browser): Integrate SQLParser with LocalDatabase for full CRUD SQL support

- Update LocalDatabase.exec() to use standard SQLParser
- Add _executeAST() with support for all statement types
- Add _evalWhereExpr() for evaluating binary expression WHERE clauses
- Convert parser AST format to LocalDatabase method calls
- Add comprehensive test suite for LocalDatabase SQL operations
- WASM writer now exports all required functions for Lance file creation

Supports: CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP TABLE
Storage: IndexedDB (small files) + OPFS (large files >50MB)
